_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Quantitation of the trabecular bone volume reveals an ∼22% reduction of bone volume per unit total volume (BV/TV) in the distal femoral metaphysis
details: Exhibited 23% reduction in trabecular bone volume (BV/TV) compared to other genotypes
